capabilityPillars.title: Growth architecture
capabilityPillars.description: I design full-funnel engines that connect acquisition, retention, marketplace execution and profitability into one measurable system.

capabilityPillars.title: AI in real business workflows
capabilityPillars.description: From forecasting dashboards to GenAI product assistants and OCR localization pipelines, I focus on AI that teams actually adopt.

capabilityPillars.title: Cross-functional transformation
capabilityPillars.description: I translate complex digital capabilities into clear business outcomes for commercial, sales, medical, product and finance stakeholders.

storyHighlights: Head of Digital leading BIODERMA's Germany digital, data and AI agenda in Munich.
Built and scaled digital marketing, CRM and analytics teams across FMCG, retail and SaaS environments.
Hands-on across paid media, CRM orchestration, marketplace growth, pricing intelligence, automation and business reporting.

careerTimeline.focus: Owns the end-to-end digital, analytics and AI agenda for Germany, connecting commercial growth with operating discipline.
meta: DACH transformation and executive stakeholder leadership
bullets: Delivered +35% e-commerce sell-out growth and +14pp contribution margin uplift through ROI-led planning and optimization.
Reduced OPEX by ~15-18% by simplifying operating model and partner setup.
Built executive systems for forecasting, scenario planning, pricing intelligence and performance governance.
Launched AI-enabled sales visit planning and a PIM-integrated GenAI product intelligence assistant.
Created privacy-aware, compliant AI workflows with Power Apps, Power Automate and role-based governance.

careerTimeline.focus: Scaled a multi-brand operating model covering digital growth, CRM, lifecycle journeys and data activation.
bullets: Scaled the digital marketing and CRM organization to 10 team members with clear governance and KPI rhythm.
Drove +20% user acquisition growth, +15% online interaction growth and 40% e-commerce sell-out growth.
Improved LTV by +69% and LTV/CAC by ~+60% through segmentation, prioritization and lifecycle design.
Launched integrated digital ecosystems across brand sites, D2C and app experiences.
Turned analytics and CRM signals into full-funnel growth strategies for multiple brands.

careerTimeline.focus: Built the digital marketing function from scratch and created the execution model for three brands.
bullets: Defined roles, responsibilities and reporting standards for a newly formed digital team.
Led full-funnel performance across paid media, content and conversion optimization.
Built measurement foundations and optimization loops for sustainable growth.
Aligned digital investment logic with broader commercial priorities and marketplace execution.

careerTimeline.focus: Owned the growth and CRM P&L while running experimentation, campaign planning and profitability-focused optimization.
meta: SEO/SEM, paid media, CRM and mobile growth
bullets: Ran performance, CRM, SEO/SEM and CRO as one integrated growth program.
Won Felis Awards 2019, MIXX Awards 2020 and Social Media Awards Turkey 2020.
Designed LTV-informed targeting models and experimentation roadmaps to improve conversion and revenue.
Worked across HR, merchandising, IT and category teams to improve efficiency and contribution margin.

careerTimeline.focus: Executed hands-on CRM, onsite growth and retention programs with strong personalization and automation discipline.
bullets: Built omnichannel campaigns across email, SMS, onsite, in-app and push channels.
Merged online and offline behavior to create win-back, retention, loyalty and cart-abandonment automations.
Generated 600% ROI with AI-powered personalized push solutions and 288% ROI with web push.
Supported online sales growth with strong focus on mobile, landing pages and retargeting.

careerTimeline.focus: Acted as strategic analytics and CRO partner for enterprise and mid-market clients.
bullets: Designed CRO scenarios, onsite marketing flows and prioritized optimization backlogs.
Managed key client relationships and translated growth goals into concrete digital roadmaps.
Served as bridge between clients and technical teams to ensure quality delivery and iteration speed.

careerTimeline.focus: Led enterprise CRM and marketing automation consulting for lifecycle, segmentation and trigger-based programs.
bullets: Designed lifecycle journeys, segmentation architecture and trigger-based campaigns for major brands.
Handled technical and strategic support across CRM, automation and email health.
Improved adoption by aligning client objectives with platform capabilities and best practices.

aiProducts.title: Gamebook AI
aiProducts.summary: Interactive gamebook creation platform where users become characters inside AI-generated story worlds with visuals and sound.
aiProducts.outcome: Built as a multimodal creator economy concept with branching narrative logic, image generation and immersive audio layers.

aiProducts.title: CO2 Score
aiProducts.summary: iOS application that helps consumers understand carbon footprint signals and sustainability trade-offs.
aiProducts.outcome: Turned sustainability scoring into a lightweight, consumer-friendly mobile experience powered by intelligent analysis.

aiProducts.title: 360 Real Estate Suite
aiProducts.summary: Property intelligence platform for virtual staging, listing workflows, operational management and immersive showcasing.
aiProducts.outcome: Combined AI staging and property operations into one platform instead of fragmented real-estate tooling.

aiProducts.title: See The Impact
aiProducts.summary: Sustainability intelligence platform that helps users evaluate brands and products through environmental insight layers.
aiProducts.outcome: Positioned as a consumer-facing ESG transparency interface with scoring, comparison and education features.

aiProducts.title: TranslASSET AI
aiProducts.summary: OCR + GenAI localization pipeline for marketing creatives across languages, channels and ad formats.
aiProducts.outcome: Reduced manual design effort and delivered roughly +60% CTR and +25% conversion uplift in localization use cases.

aiProducts.title: Pricing Validation & Intelligence
aiProducts.summary: AI/ML-powered pricing intelligence platform connecting PIM data, retailer prices and competitor normalization.
aiProducts.outcome: Supports pricing compliance, competitor benchmarking and margin-aware decision-making at product level.
